creator: ivy@FreeBSD.org
text:
while booting, the kernel reports a LOR in gpioled(4).  the system appears to work fine aside from this (i am not using the LED driver).

gpioled0: <GPIO LEDs> on ofwbus0
lock order reversal: (sleepable after non-sleepable)
 1st 0xffff000000dd5678 LED mtx (LED mtx, sleep mutex) @ /usr/src/sys/dev/led/led.c:295
 2nd 0xffffa000013f8810 Raspberry Pi firmware gpio (Raspberry Pi firmware gpio, sx) @ /usr/src/sys/arm/broadcom/bcm2835/raspberrypi_gpio.c:250
lock order LED mtx -> Raspberry Pi firmware gpio attempted at:
#0 0xffff0000005257e0 at witness_checkorder+0xa78
#1 0xffff0000004ba384 at _sx_xlock+0x70
#2 0xffff00000092a8e8 at rpi_fw_gpio_pin_set+0xe4
#3 0xffff0000001dc00c at led_create_state+0x15c
#4 0xffff0000001a2f34 at gpioled_attach+0x294
#5 0xffff0000004ec360 at device_attach+0x3fc
#6 0xffff0000004ebec8 at device_probe_and_attach+0x80
#7 0xffff0000004ee4d4 at bus_generic_new_pass+0x100
#8 0xffff0000004ee484 at bus_generic_new_pass+0xb0
#9 0xffff0000004ee484 at bus_generic_new_pass+0xb0
#10 0xffff0000004e8d60 at bus_set_pass+0x50
#11 0xffff00000043138c at mi_startup+0x1e0
#12 0xffff0000000008a8 at virtdone+0x68
uma_zalloc_debug: zone "malloc-64" with the following non-sleepable locks held:
exclusive sleep mutex LED mtx (LED mtx) r = 0 (0xffff000000dd5678) locked @ /usr/src/sys/dev/led/led.c:295
stack backtrace:
#0 0xffff000000525c50 at witness_debugger+0x60
#1 0xffff000000526ee4 at witness_warn+0x40c
#2 0xffff0000007eaa9c at uma_zalloc_debug+0x34
#3 0xffff0000007ea628 at uma_zalloc_arg+0x30
#4 0xffff000000481aa4 at malloc+0x90
#5 0xffff00000091f568 at bcm2835_firmware_property+0x48
#6 0xffff00000092a900 at rpi_fw_gpio_pin_set+0xfc
#7 0xffff0000001dc00c at led_create_state+0x15c
#8 0xffff0000001a2f34 at gpioled_attach+0x294
#9 0xffff0000004ec360 at device_attach+0x3fc
#10 0xffff0000004ebec8 at device_probe_and_attach+0x80
#11 0xffff0000004ee4d4 at bus_generic_new_pass+0x100
#12 0xffff0000004ee484 at bus_generic_new_pass+0xb0
#13 0xffff0000004ee484 at bus_generic_new_pass+0xb0
#14 0xffff0000004e8d60 at bus_set_pass+0x50
#15 0xffff00000043138c at mi_startup+0x1e0
#16 0xffff0000000008a8 at virtdone+0x68

related: bug 248490 which was closed as "overcome by events" but the issue is still present.
